introSection: Spinning Coaster was a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Beijing Shijingshan Amusement Park in Shijingshan, Beijing, China.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: When it opened in 2004, it had yellow track and green supports. For 2010, it was repainted purple with turquoise supports. Between 2012 and 2014 it was repainted red with blue supports. At some point from 2014 to 2017, the coaster was removed.

sections.title: Images

fullText:
Spinning Coaster was a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Beijing Shijingshan Amusement Park in Shijingshan, Beijing, China.

When it opened in 2004, it had yellow track and green supports. For 2010, it was repainted purple with turquoise supports. Between 2012 and 2014 it was repainted red with blue supports. At some point from 2014 to 2017, the coaster was removed.

Riders sat back-to-back.

Photographs of the ride as it appeared in 2012.
